result.status_detail: blackbox real chat is login-gated; www.blackbox.ai only has a scripted demo widget — engine path never exercised, no 차단 rendered

notes: W1+W2 struct-collapse regression check on blackbox. Request URL https://www.blackbox.ai/ is a MARKETING landing page, not a real chat. Its only input[type=text] (placeholder 'Make changes, ask questions, or provide new instructions...') feeds a SCRIPTED DEMO widget: submitting the exact PII prompt '내 주민등록번호는 901010-1234567' (CDP-verified value set + SEND clicked + input cleared) only echoed the prompt against a hardcoded canned reply ('All three solutions are ready. Chairman LLM evaluated...WINNER SELECTED'). No backend request fires, so the APF engine cannot intercept and no 차단 / 민감정보 warning can render (deep DOM + shadow-root scan: has차단=false, hasSensitive=false). The real chat lives at app.blackbox.ai (GET ACCESS/GET STARTED links) which is behind a login wall (Sign In / Get Started for Free, no usable composer; this session is NOT logged into blackbox). Verdict INCONCLUSIVE, NOT a regression: the W1+W2 dead-field removal + cached_*→extracted_kv migration is engine-side and was never exercised here — failure is test-environment access (AUTH_REQUIRED), not warning-rendering. Note: two Chrome instances present; only PID 18308 exposes CDP:9222 (had gemini/kimi). Test driven entirely via CDP Runtime.evaluate on a CDP-opened blackbox tab (reliable DOM read; no Scrape — windows-mcp Scrape use_dom errors with 'ScrollElementNode' has no attribute 'vertical_scroll_percent'). RECOMMENDATION for dev: re-issue with a logged-in app.blackbox.ai session or use a service with anonymous chat. Baseline services this batch (baidu #1214, character #1216, chatglm #1213) all PASS — no W1+W2 regression observed elsewhere.
